name: Crespelle Alla Modenese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Saute the mushrooms in butter until they are sautéed through; set aside.
3. Fill each crepe with a generous amount of ricotta mixed with the egg yolk and seasoned with salt and pepper, shaping them into small pouches secured by strips of crepe dough.
4. In a casserole dish, prepare your favorite white sauce, adding a pinch of nutmeg.
5. Add the mushroom crepes to the dish, pour the sauce over them, and sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
